creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I gave the Ex-President of the FreeBSD Project a script to recreate 
INDEX files in the package dirs every night from ports-current/INDEX 
to only include the existent packages, which he activated on the ftp 
site.  So this shall never happen again (unless Citizen Jordan screwed 
up, of course! :)
